name: flowprint
description: Segment completed AI work into explicit workflow candidates, compile one user-selected non-installed Agent Skill draft, and revise it through hash-bound confirmation without recording or exporting the conversation.

interface.shortDescription: Select one reusable workflow and compile a guarded Skill draft.
interface.longDescription: FlowPrint starts after an AI task is complete, validates the project evidence root before searching, separates adjacent reusable workflows before six-layer classification, stops for explicit user selection when multiple candidates exist, compiles one dependency-tracked Skill draft, and routes later corrections through impact analysis, stale-state invalidation, fresh user confirmation, and non-overwriting recompilation.
defaultPrompt: Turn this completed task into a validated Skill draft.
Extract a reusable workflow from what we just finished.
Detect whether this completed task contains multiple reusable workflows and stop for my selection before compiling.
Start FlowPrint, validate the project scope, and inspect current task evidence.
Revise this FlowPrint draft from my correction without overwriting the previous version.
